title: Speckled Glaze Bone China Heart Handle Ceramic Mug 350ml Cream Coffee Cup, Cute Tea Cup for Hot Drinks Valentine’s Gift Mug Assorted Designs (Tan)
features: Cute Heart Handle Design – Each mug features a unique curved heart-shaped handle for a charming touch at breakfast, brunch or evening tea.
Coffee Time Slogan – Stylish gold or brown script across a speckled cream glaze makes this an eye-catching gift or treat for yourself.
Ideal 350ml Size – Perfect for coffee, tea, hot chocolate, or even as a small dessert mug – cosy and comfortable to hold.
Gift-Ready Look – A sweet present for Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, anniversaries, or as a just-because surprise.
Assorted Handle Colours – Available in beige, tan, and mocha handle designs each with its own matching inner colour.
description: Start your mornings with a little warmth and a lot of heart. This charming ceramic mug isn’t just for coffee it’s a moment of comfort in your day. With its soft cream glaze, hand-speckled finish, and curved heart-shaped handle, every sip feels more thoughtful. The “Coffee Time” slogan on the front adds a cheerful touch, printed in either warm gold or rich brown depending on your chosen style. Whether you're gifting it to a loved one or treating yourself to a little countertop joy, this mug makes everyday moments feel a bit more special. Crafted from durable ceramic and holding up to 390ml, it's just the right size for coffee, tea, or even a cosy cup of hot chocolate. Available in three elegant colour combinations, each with a matching inner glaze and heart handle. A perfect choice for birthdays, Valentine’s Day, housewarmings
